response: The Scrum Master’s email sharing sprint retrospective notes highlights two recent sprint successes—shipping the auth redesign on time and strong cross-team collaboration with the design team—along with two key shortcomings: excessive context switches from developers working across three different projects, and standups that ran 10 minutes over the 15-minute target at 25 minutes long. The email lays out two action items to resolve those gaps: limiting each developer’s work in progress to only two items, and implementing timeboxed standups with a parking lot to keep future meetings efficient.
